name: Spiced Rum & Pineapple
title: Spiced Rum & Pineapple Juice Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Rum & Pineapple Juice | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple tropical highball that combines BACARDÍ Spiced rum with pineapple juice over ice.
marketing_description: BACARDÍ Spiced into pineapple juice to spice up a sweet drink. It's easy to make and even easier to impress friends. Packed with vibrant tropical flavour, this cocktail is sunshine in a glass.

steps: Fill a highball or Tiki glass with cubed or crushed ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum.
Add chilled pineapple juice. Give it all a gentle stir.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf.

garnish: pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a SPICED RUM & PINEAPPLE 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml pineapple juice Servings Copy Spiced with Pineapple ingredients Copied! Spiced with Pineapple recipe One step at a time 1 Chill Fill a highball or Tiki glass with cubed or crushed ice. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum. 3 Stir Add chilled pineapple juice. Give it all a gentle stir. 4 Garnish Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf.
